data.title: Bitwise has filed its S-1 application for the Hyperliquid ETF with the SEC.
data.description: Bitwise has filed an S-1 registration statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a proposed ETF related to Hyperliquid. The application is currently awaiting regulatory review.

data.title: BlackRock registers iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF in Delaware
data.description: BlackRock has completed the registration of the "iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF" in Delaware. The entity form is a statutory trust, the registered agent is BlackRock Advisors, LLC, and the incorporation date is September 25, 2025. It is reported that the ETF aims to provide investors with premium returns related to Bitcoin. (Aggr News)

data.title: SEC Chairman: Will strictly investigate conflicts of interest in the crypto sector and plan to introduce an innovation exemption policy before the end of the year
data.description: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chairman Paul Atkins stated at a conference at Georgetown University that the SEC will rigorously examine conflicts of interest in the cryptocurrency sector and take enforcement action when necessary. He also revealed that the SEC plans to introduce an "innovation exemption" policy by the end of the year to accelerate the marketization of on-chain products and services. (The Block)

data.title: SEC and Finra investigate unusual trading before crypto treasury company announcements
data.description: Over 200 companies that announced the adoption of crypto treasury strategies have come under scrutiny from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (Finra) due to unusual stock price fluctuations prior to the announcement. Sources familiar with the matter revealed that regulators have sent letters to some companies, noting that significant increases in trading volume and stock prices prior to the announcement of plans to purchase crypto assets may indicate violations of Regulation Fair Disclosure (Reg FD), which prohibits companies from selectively disclosing material, non-public information to individual investors. Lawyers say such letters often signal the possibility of further insider trading investigations. (Wall Street Journal)

data.title: Dogecoin Down 18%, But Whale Withdraws 122 Million DOGE From Binance
data.description:
On-chain data shows a Dogecoin whale has made a significant withdrawal from cryptocurrency exchange Binance despite the decline in the memecoin’s price. Dogecoin Whale Has Made A Massive Move During The Past Day According to data from cryptocurrency transaction tracker service Whale Alert, a large move has been spotted on the Dogecoin blockchain over the past day. The transfer in question involved the movement of nearly 122. 4 million DOGE, worth around $28
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/dogecoin-2/dogecoin-down-16-whale-122-million-doge-binance/

data.title: The abnormal rise in XPL contracts on Aster was caused by the removal of the mark price cap
data.description: According to Guthix analysis, Aster Exchange hard-coded the XPL contract index price to $1 and set a mark price cap of $1.22. After removing this cap, the XPL price briefly surged to $4, while prices on other platforms remained stable. Previous news: Aster responded to the XPL contract price spike: User funds are safe, and affected users will be compensated.

data.title: Citigroup predicts that the scale of stablecoins may reach $4 trillion in 2030, but bank token trading volume may surpass it
data.description: In its latest report, Citigroup raised its forecast for global stablecoin issuance in 2030 to $1.9 trillion in its baseline scenario, and up to $4 trillion in a bull market scenario, corresponding to an annual trading volume of $200 trillion. The report also noted that, driven by businesses' demand for regulatory safeguards, the trading volume of bank tokens (such as tokenized deposits) may surpass stablecoins, potentially exceeding $100 trillion by 2030. Citigroup believes that stablecoins, bank tokens, and central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) will coexist in the long term, jointly driving the reshaping of financial infrastructure. (CoinDesk)

data.title: US regulators investigate cryptocurrency strategic reserve company for insider trading
data.description: The Wall Street Journal, citing people familiar with the matter, reported that U.S. financial regulators have launched investigations into some companies that announced the adoption of cryptocurrency reserve strategies, focusing on unusual trading that occurred before the announcements. The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and the Financial Industry Regulatory Authority have sent letters to some companies, pointing out that the trading volume of the relevant stocks increased significantly and the stock price rose rapidly in the days before the announcement, which may pose a risk of violating the Fair Disclosure Rules. Lawyers say that such letters usually indicate that insider trading investigations may be further deepened. Reports indicate that more than 200 companies have followed the model of Strategy (MSTR.O) this year, raising funds to purchase Bitcoin and other digital assets through the issuance of stocks and bonds. (Wall Street Journal)

data.title: Three newly created wallets withdrew a total of 58,300 ETH from CEX, worth approximately $242 million.
data.description: According to OnchainLens monitoring, three newly created wallets received a total of 58,300 ETH from Kraken and BitGo, worth approximately US$242 million.

data.title: Crypto Finance Integrates Chainlink Proof of Reserves for Crypto Asset ETPs
data.description: Crypto Finance, a financial platform under Deutsche Börse Group that provides professional digital asset solutions to institutional clients, has now launched Chainlink's Proof of Reserve. As the first user, nxtAssets now enables on-chain verification of physically-backed Ethereum and Bitcoin exchange-traded products (ETPs) held on Crypto Finance. Chainlink's Proof of Reserve enables investors to independently verify the actual holdings behind the ETPs. This innovation provides investors with additional transparency and security, establishing a new standard of trust in the digital asset market. The setup combines three key roles: nxtAssets issues and manages the ETPs, Crypto Finance provides compliant custody of the underlying assets, and Chainlink provides tamper-proof reserve data on-chain. “Transparency in digital asset markets requires not only regular reporting but also continuously verifiable data,” said Fernando Vazquez, President of Banking and Capital Markets at Chainlink Labs. “By integrating Chainlink’s Proof of Reserves, Crypto Finance demonstrates how a regulated custodian can provide investors with assurance that each product is backed by the underlying assets. Starting with the first two nxtAssets ETPs, this live implementation sets a new benchmark for trust and accountability in the global ETP market, with more products to come.”

data.title: OpenAI Introduces GDPval to Assess AI's Economic Impact
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has launched a new evaluation tool named GDPval, designed to measure the performance of AI in tasks that contribute to real-world economic value. GDPval encompasses 44 professions across the nine largest sectors contributing to the U.S. GDP. These tasks were crafted by industry experts with an average of 14 years of experience. The evaluation results indicate that the Claude Opus 4.1 model's outputs are on par with or exceed expert levels in nearly half of the cases. OpenAI plans to continue expanding the scope and details of GDPval assessments in the future.

data.title: US Democrats call for investigation into Trump family's overseas cryptocurrency transactions
data.description: Warren, a Democratic member of the U.S. Senate, called for an investigation into the Trump family's overseas cryptocurrency transactions. (Jinshi)

data.title: CleanSpark shareholders granted class action lawsuit alleging misleading investors over company's Bitcoin transition
data.description: A CleanSpark investor has been granted permission to file a class-action lawsuit on behalf of shareholders, alleging misleading behavior during the company's transition from clean energy to bitcoin mining, according to a U.S. District Court for the Southern District of New York. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Vitalik: Fusaka upgrade will promote the expansion of Ethereum L1 and L2
data.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin stated that PeerDAS, a core feature of the Fusaka upgrade, enables blockchain operations without requiring a single node to download the entire data set. This mechanism verifies block data availability through node sampling and utilizes erasure coding to recover missing data. While the first version still requires complete data for initial broadcast and data reconstruction, security is maintained with only one honest participant. Vitalik emphasized that security is paramount, and that the number of blobs will be gradually increased in the future to advance Ethereum's scaling efforts on both Layer 1 and Layer 2.

data.title: Trump-Linked Crypto Project Freezes Nearly All of Sun’s WLFI Tokens
data.description:
The project’s team quietly blacklisted four addresses on Ethereum – but nearly all of the affected tokens belong to Sun.
source: https://coindoo.com/trump-linked-crypto-project-freezes-nearly-all-of-suns-wlfi-tokens/

data.title: New Book on AI Says 'Everyone Dies,' Leading Chatbots Disagree
data.description:
Though the book by two prominent AI doomers brands today’s AI arms race a “suicide race,” most AI platforms shrugged off the risk.
source: https://decrypt.co/341501/new-book-on-ai-says-everyone-dies-ai-chatbots-disagree

data.description:
The SEC delayed action on Canary's SUI and PENGU funds, along with staked INJ and SEI funds, and some spot Avalanche proposals.

data.title: Tether mints 1 billion USDT on Ethereum – Details behind this move
data.description:
What prompted Tether to proceed with this move, and why did they choose Ethereum for the USDT mint?
source: https://ambcrypto.com/tether-mints-1-billion-usdt-on-ethereum-details-behind-this-move/

data.title: OpenAI Introduces Pulse Feature for Mobile Pro Users
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has launched a new feature called Pulse for its mobile Pro users. This feature is designed to automatically generate daily personalized content recommendations based on user interests, related data, and recent conversations. Users can customize their content preferences using the 'curate' function, which also allows integration with Gmail and Google Calendar to enhance the relevance of suggestions. As users provide more personal preferences during daily interactions, Pulse will continuously refine the content it delivers. Currently, Pulse is available exclusively to Pro users, but OpenAI plans to consider expanding access to Plus users in the future.

data.title: U.S. Dollar Expected to Remain Weak Through 2025 Amid Economic Shifts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a report by CITIC Securities highlights that since 2011, the U.S. dollar has experienced a prolonged period of strength due to factors such as the relative advantage of the U.S. economy, interest rate differentials, and the high attractiveness of dollar assets. However, since the second half of 2022, the narrowing of monetary policy differences between the U.S. and other countries has initiated a new weak cycle for the dollar. Considering factors like the narrowing U.S. monetary policy gap and slowing economic momentum, the dollar's weakness is expected to persist throughout 2025.
